title: celsia lyrata
intro: Celsia lyrata, also known as the Lyre-leaved Celsia or Celsia lyiata, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help soothe and calm various health issues. The health benefits of Celsia lyrata include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, making it a potential natural remedy for stress and sleep disorders. Herbal preparations of Celsia lyrata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
